title: Maya Jama Wants to Be a Villain in Movies
summary: Maya Jama is a famous TV host from Britain who presents shows like Love Island and The Masked Singer. She is 31 years old and lives in Manchester with her partner, a football player. When she was younger, Maya dreamed of being an actor but got many rejections and felt sad, so she stopped trying. Instead, she started making videos on YouTube and later became a TV presenter. Now, she is getting a new chance to act and will appear in a Netflix series called The Gentlemen. Maya says she is ready to try something different and wants to play a monster or villain in movies, not a nice character like herself. She thinks it would be fun to be the opposite of what people expect.

background_read: Maya Jama is a well-known TV personality in Britain who hosts popular shows. She started her career by making videos online and worked hard to become a presenter. Now, she is excited to try acting again and wants to take on challenging roles that are different from her real-life personality.
Article_Structure: WHO: Maya Jama, a 31-year-old TV host from Britain
WHAT: She wants to become an actor and play a monster or villain in movies
WHERE: She lives in Manchester and will act in a Netflix series
WHY: She feels ready for a new challenge and wants to be the opposite of what people expect

perspectives.description: Maya is switching from TV presenting to acting to try something new
